steps.t: Eywind is at his camp with Nogmeldir, at the entrance to the High Pass. Nogmeldir suggested you speak with Eywind concerning the Wargs and what the dw…
The dwarf brothers are said to dwell at Hrimbarg, to the east and a bit south of Vindurhal. Eywind suggested you find the dwarf-brothers he spoke of a…
Nogmeldir is at Vindurhal, a little north and to the west of Hrimbarg. You should return to Nogmeldir and tell him what you have learned of the Wargs.
